data.body: Plan-review PASS (blocking 0), signed at 8b888716; claimed. Advisories folded into the build: pin the planned-trace event format [DET-check-id | (prompt-id, INTENDED model, call-mode agent|1-shot) | det-step-id]; assert PRE-ESCALATION only (tolerate runtime size-ladder divergence); normalize to ignore concurrency ordering but pin prompt-id+intended-model+call-mode+det-steps; assert at BOTH offline seams (batch's injected rebar.llm.Runner for finders AND the engine AgentStepRunner for verify). Will reconcile the known B2 DET-block short-circuit divergence (workflow skips LLM on P1/P5/P8; bespoke merges an LLM pass on P1) — assert parity on non-block scenarios + document/justify the block-case divergence.
